documentation.description:
| Purpose
| Macro is used to manipulate an abstract state machine
| which contains a group of macro definitions.  It provides routines
| for building new macro definitions and extracting the lines from
| a macro definition.
|
| Initialization Exceptions (none)
| Notes (none)
|
| Modifications
| 08/16/89  Rick Conn    Initial Version

subprograms.name: Create
subprograms.code:
procedure Create
  (Macro_Name : in STRING; Id : in out MACRO_ID; Status : out MACRO_STATUS)

subprograms.name: Define_Parameters
subprograms.code:
procedure Define_Parameters
  (Macro_Name : in STRING; Parameters : in STRING)

subprograms.name: Is_Empty
subprograms.code: function Is_Empty (Id : in MACRO_ID) return BOOLEAN

subprograms.name: Locate
subprograms.code: function Locate (Macro_Name : in STRING) return MACRO_STATUS

subprograms.name: Open
subprograms.code:
procedure Open
  (Macro_Name : in STRING; Id : out MACRO_ID; Status : out MACRO_STATUS)

subprograms.name: Read
subprograms.code:
procedure Read
  (Id : in out MACRO_ID; Item : out STRING; Last : out NATURAL)

subprograms.name: Write
subprograms.code: procedure Write (Id : in out MACRO_ID; Line : in STRING)
